CWE-112.description: The product accepts XML from an untrusted source but does not validate the XML against the proper schema.
CWE-112.detection_notes: Statically detectable via taint analysis, config parsing, handler inspection, and regex on dangerous patterns (e.g., .Raw( with + or fmt.Sprintf in query context).
CWE-112.name: Missing XML Validation
CWE-112.original_description: The product accepts XML from an untrusted source but does not validate the XML against the proper schema.

CWE-140.description: The product does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralizes delimiters.
CWE-140.detection_notes: Statically detectable via taint analysis, config parsing, handler inspection, and regex on dangerous patterns (e.g., .Raw( with + or fmt.Sprintf in query context).
CWE-140.name: Improper Neutralization of Delimiters
CWE-140.original_description: The product does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralizes delimiters.
